name: VPN / Zero Trust Gateway Bypass
description: Attack tree modelling bypass of VPN concentrators and Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA) gateways through edge device vulnerabilities, credential theft, and session hijacking
root_objective: Bypass VPN or ZTNA gateway to gain internal network access

nodes.title: Bypass VPN/ZTNA Gateway
nodes.description: Gain unauthorised access to the internal corporate network by bypassing or compromising the VPN/ZTNA perimeter

nodes.title: Exploit VPN Appliance Vulnerability
nodes.description: Exploit known or zero-day vulnerabilities in edge VPN appliances

nodes.title: Exploit Ivanti/Pulse Secure CVE
nodes.description: Leverage critical CVEs (e.g., CVE-2023-46805, CVE-2024-21887) in Ivanti Connect Secure for pre-auth RCE

nodes.title: Exploit Fortinet SSL-VPN
nodes.description: Exploit FortiOS SSL-VPN vulnerabilities (e.g., CVE-2023-27997) for unauthenticated remote code execution

nodes.title: Exploit Citrix NetScaler (CitrixBleed)
nodes.description: Exploit Citrix ADC/Gateway vulnerabilities to extract session tokens from memory

nodes.title: Steal VPN Credentials
nodes.description: Obtain valid VPN user credentials to authenticate normally

nodes.title: Phish VPN One-Time Passwords
nodes.description: Use real-time phishing proxy to capture VPN username, password, and MFA token simultaneously

nodes.title: Credential Stuffing with Leaked Passwords
nodes.description: Test leaked credential databases against the VPN login portal

nodes.title: Hijack Existing VPN Session
nodes.description: Take over an already-authenticated VPN session

nodes.title: Steal VPN Session Cookie
nodes.description: Extract VPN session cookies from compromised endpoint's browser or memory to replay the session

nodes.title: Bypass ZTNA Posture Checks
nodes.description: Circumvent device health and posture verification required by ZTNA solutions

nodes.title: Spoof Device Compliance Status
nodes.description: Modify device health attestation responses to appear compliant with endpoint requirements

nodes.title: Compromise a Managed Device
nodes.description: Take over an already-enrolled corporate device that passes all posture checks legitimately
